title: Key Challenges in Neural Network Optimization
description: A flowchart depicting the primary optimization challenges encountered during neural network training and their interconnected relationships.
relationships: Poor Initialization can lead to Vanishing/Exploding Gradients
Vanishing/Exploding Gradients cause ineffective weight updates
Ineffective updates can trap the model in Local Minima or Saddle Points
High learning rates or sparse data can cause Noisy/Oscillating Updates, preventing convergence
